subHeadline: The question every Land Rover owner eventually faces, answered honestly rather than sold around. We tell you when to repair, when to replace, and when to scrap — based on real UK data, not estimates.

verdict.text: Watch — sub-£10k examples approach the threshold. Service history matters more than mileage.
Scrap threshold — recon cost frequently exceeds car value on older examples.
Safe — replacement viable across most examples. Well within value even at upper recon cost.
Safe — well within value even at upper recon cost. The safest-to-buy generation.
Safe — very safe across all variants. High host value means replacement is always viable.
Watch — older examples sit at 40–60% of vehicle value. Get a scrap valuation alongside any repair quote.

ruleOfThumb.title: The Rule of Thumb
ruleOfThumb.text: If reconditioned engine cost runs at 60% or more of what your car is actually worth on today's market, get a scrap valuation alongside any repair quote — don't decide on repair cost alone.
